subject: Project pulse: ragdoll execution in Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q2 review | INIT-2477
body: Following yesterday's call, the ragdoll effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Katherine Johnson seems to disagree with Albert Einstein on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-2477. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coffee, coordination.
